hero.title: Your website should bring you customers, not headaches.
hero.subtitle: Is your website old and hard to understand? We help you rebuild it into a modern, easy-to-use system that brings in new business. We handle the tech; you handle the business.

valueProposition.headline: More Than Just a Pretty Page. A Real Helper for Your Business.
valueProposition.subheadline: We don't just build common websites—we create systems that handle customers for you and save you time.
valueProposition.body: It’s not enough anymore to just 'have a presence online.' Your site must be clear, fast, and work perfectly on smartphones. We build modern solutions that every one of your customers will understand.

items.title: Modern & Clear Website
items.desc: Your customers will immediately understand what you offer. Your site will be modern, clean, and look great on both computers and phones.

items.title: Automatic Helper
items.desc: We’ll add a smart system to your site that answers your customers' questions 24/7. You’ll never miss a potential order again.

items.title: Everything Under One Roof
items.desc: You don't need to be a tech expert. We handle your domain, emails, security, and updates. You focus entirely on your customers.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: We are here to help you succeed in the digital world without the technical jargon.

footer.tagline: Your partner for modern web solutions. We build websites that deliver results.

sections.heading: Article 1: Introduction
sections.content: Engineers-incubator s.r.o. protects your privacy. These rules explain how we handle your data on our website https://euhub-ai.com.

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.content: Welcome to euhub-ai.com. By using this site, you agree to our terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

sections.heading: What are cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small files in your browser that help our site work better.
